mapper.sql: id, st_avatar_url, avatar_url, cover_url, chat_background_url, st_world_names_json, owner_user_id, name, description, tagline, bio, persona, scenario, first_message, alternate_greetings_json, mes_example, system_prompt, post_history_instructions, private_card, review_status, review_reason, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, occupation_label, tags_json, vip_only, unlocked_default, client_visible, preview_blur_vip_level, like_count, dislike_count, creator_name, creator_handle, token_display, gameplay_type, chat_modes_json, sort_order, creator_notes, st_extra_json
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_character WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL ORDER BY deleted_at IS NULL DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 1 AND owner_user_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 1 AND owner_user_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 1 AND owner_user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY deleted_at IS NULL DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM app_character WHERE st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl} AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (avatar_url IS NULL OR avatar_url = '') AND (cover_url IS NULL OR cover_url = '') AND (creator_name IS NULL OR creator_name = '') AND (creator_handle IS NULL OR creator_handle = '') AND (tags_json IS NULL OR tags_json = '' OR tags_json = '[]') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_character (st_avatar_url, name, description) VALUES (#{stAvatarUrl}, #{name}, #{description})

INSERT INTO app_character ( st_avatar_url, name, description, owner_user_id, tagline, bio, persona, scenario, first_message, alternate_greetings_json, mes_example, system_prompt, post_history_instructions, avatar_url, cover_url, chat_background_url, st_world_names_json, private_card, review_status, review_reason, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, occupation_label, tags_json, vip_only, unlocked_default, client_visible, preview_blur_vip_level, like_count, dislike_count, creator_name, creator_handle, token_display, gameplay_type, chat_modes_json, sort_order, creator_notes, st_extra_json ) VALUES ( #{stAvatarUrl}, #{name}, #{description}, #{ownerUserId}, #{tagline}, #{bio}, #{persona}, #{scenario}, #{firstMessage}, #{alternateGreetingsJson}, #{mesExample}, #{systemPrompt}, #{postHistoryInstructions}, #{avatarUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{chatBackgroundUrl}, #{stWorldNamesJson}, #{privateCard}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewReason}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{occupationLabel}, #{tagsJson}, #{vipOnly}, #{unlockedDefault}, #{clientVisible}, #{previewBlurVipLevel}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{creatorName}, #{creatorHandle}, #{tokenDisplay}, #{gameplayType}, #{chatModesJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{creatorNotes}, #{stExtraJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_character SET st_avatar_url = #{stAvatarUrl}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, chat_background_url = #{chatBackgroundUrl}, st_world_names_json = #{stWorldNamesJson}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tagline = #{tagline}, bio = #{bio}, persona = #{persona}, scenario = #{scenario}, first_message = #{firstMessage}, alternate_greetings_json = #{alternateGreetingsJson}, mes_example = #{mesExample}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, post_history_instructions = #{postHistoryInstructions}, private_card = #{privateCard}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, occupation_label = #{occupationLabel}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, vip_only = #{vipOnly}, unlocked_default = #{unlockedDefault}, client_visible = #{clientVisible}, preview_blur_vip_level = #{previewBlurVipLevel}, like_count = #{likeCount}, dislike_count = #{dislikeCount}, creator_name = #{creatorName}, creator_handle = #{creatorHandle}, token_display = #{tokenDisplay}, gameplay_type = #{gameplayType}, chat_modes_json = #{chatModesJson}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, creator_notes = #{creatorNotes}, st_extra_json = #{stExtraJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_character ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL AND review_status = 'APPROVED' AND client_visible = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT tags_json FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND private_card = 0 AND owner_user_id IS NULL AND review_status = 'APPROVED' AND client_visible = 1 AND tags_json IS NOT NULL AND tags_json != ''
mapper.update: UPDATE app_character SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM app_character WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND private_card = 1 AND owner_user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY owner_user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE app_character SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
